name: tenant-screening
description: Evaluate potential tenants for a commercial or residential property. Extract applicant data, assess risk, compare against criteria, and produce a screening report.

config.instruction: Extract applicant data: business name (commercial) or individual name (residential), income/revenue, credit indicators, rental history, references, business type, number of employees, years in operation, reason for moving, desired lease terms.

Assess tenant risk: financial stability (can they pay?), business viability (will they last?), industry risk (recession-sensitive?), litigation history, and reference quality. Rate overall risk as LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH.
If multiple applicants, compare them side by side: financial strength, lease terms offered, business stability, fit with property/tenant mix, and risk profile. Rank applicants.

Produce the tenant screening report: applicant summary, financial qualification (pass/fail on income-to-rent ratio), risk assessment, comparison ranking if applicable, recommended lease terms (security deposit, guarantor requirements, lease length), and final recommendation (Approve / Conditional / Decline).
